svg.title: HLS Streaming Workflow
svg.desc: Diagram showing how an MP3 file is segmented on the backend and streamed to a client player via HLS protocol

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is an MP3 audio file in HLS?')
sendPrompt('How does the HLS audio segmenter work?')
sendPrompt('What are .ts transport stream chunks in HLS?')
sendPrompt('What is an .m3u8 playlist file in HLS?')
sendPrompt('How does an HLS audio player work?')
sendPrompt('How does HLS achieve continuous audio playback?')
